mapper.insert: INSERT INTO contents_daily_stats (STAT_DATE, CTNT_NO, VIEW_CNT) VALUES (#{statDt}, #{ctntNo}, #{viewCnt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE VIEW_CNT = VALUES(VIEW_CNT)
INSERT INTO contents_view_stats (CTNT_NO, VIEW_CNT) VALUES (#{ctntNo}, #{viewCnt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE VIEW_CNT = VALUES(VIEW_CNT)

INSERT IGNORE INTO contents_daily_stats (STAT_DATE, CTNT_NO, VIEW_CNT) VALUES
(#{item.viewDt}, #{item.ctntNo}, #{item.viewCnt})
mapper.select: SELECT statDate, totalViewCnt, totalViewCnt - LAG(totalViewCnt) OVER (ORDER BY statDate) AS dailyGrowth FROM ( SELECT STAT_DATE AS statDate, SUM(VIEW_CNT) AS totalViewCnt FROM contents_daily_stats WHERE STAT_DATE BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY STAT_DATE ) daily ORDER BY statDate

SELECT RANK() OVER (ORDER BY cvs.VIEW_CNT DESC) AS rankNo, cvs.CTNT_NO AS ctntNo, cm.CTNT_TITLE AS ctntTitle, cvs.VIEW_CNT AS viewCnt FROM contents_view_stats cvs JOIN contents_mst cm ON cvs.CTNT_NO = cm.CTNT_NO ORDER BY cvs.VIEW_CNT DESC LIMIT 10
